report_name: Krispy Kreme Reaches $1.6M Settlement for 2024 Data Breach

identities.name: Krispy Kreme
identities.description: A doughnut chain that experienced a data breach in 2024, exposing customer data. The company agreed to a $1.6 million class-action settlement to resolve the subsequent lawsuit.

identities.name: Krispy Kreme Customers
identities.description: A class of individuals whose personal and financial information, including names, Social Security numbers, and financial account details, was compromised in the 2024 Krispy Kreme data breach.
